rationale: All four templates show a clear type hierarchy (display-sm title > strong labels > body > caption source), consistent 80px left margins with symmetric gutters (kpi three-up and split-analysis both resolve to balanced 80px outer margins and even inter-column gaps), and practical, non-overlapping slot placement within the 1280x720 frame. No overflow, misalignment, or hard-fail evidence is visible, and each slot's role and capacity is coherent with its rendered content.
